prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body portrait of a male character, Takayama Fuyuko, standing centered on a pure white background, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors. The character has an extremely handsome face with delicate, refined features, high intelligence, and high physical fitness exuding immense charm. He has chestnut brown long hair styled elegantly, adorned with musical note hair accessories. His eyes are clear and expressive, with a gentle, warm smile. He wears the pristine white academy uniform of Celestial Harmony Academy, complete with a music emblem. His figure is slender yet toned, with fair skin and lips in a soft cherry blossom pink. He wears intellectual glasses, enhancing his elegant and gentle demeanor. The overall aesthetic is beautiful and delicate, fitting the theme of classical music and modern technology, with an atmosphere of cherry blossoms and youthful dreams. no text, no symbols, no words., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
